Chen Wei йҷіз…’
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Wei (йҷіз…’). Served Han as High Minister. Advisor to Li Ying. Mocked in jest by young Kong Rong. Chen Wei was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
